title: Add structured output schemas for agent responses
source: Claude structured output and JSON mode best practices (Anthropic API docs, 2025-2026)
description: Agent output parsing in delegate.py relies on fragile regex extraction of JSON from free-text responses (parsing team updates via regex in `parse_team_agent_output`). Claude now supports enforced JSON schema output via `--output-format json` with schema definitions. Using structured output eliminates parsing failures, ensures all required fields are present, and makes team communication reliable.
proposed_changes: In `scripts/schemas.py`, define JSON schemas for agent responses: (1) `AgentTicketResponse` schema with fields: status (enum), summary, files_changed (array), code_review_notes, team_updates (object with messages/decisions/blocked_on arrays); (2) `ArchitectResponse` extending base with architecture_decisions and interface_definitions. In delegate.py `delegate_to_agent()` (line 800), add `--output-format json` to the claude command and pass the schema. Replace the regex-based `parse_team_agent_output()` (line 342) with direct JSON parsing of the structured response. Update `build_prompt()` to instruct agents to respond in the defined schema format, removing the markdown-based team communication template.
reject_reason: Apply failed: Evolve timed out after 300s
